response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as Hakui Koyori's birthday live, specifically featuring the animated MV for her song '管制塔より' (From the Control Tower). 2. Used the search tool to find the song title, artist, and full lyrics in both original Japanese and English translation. 3. Mapped the scenes: 00:00-03:32 is talk, 03:32-end is the musical performance. 4. Constructed the JSON object according to the requirements.
response.global_summary: 博衣こより（Hakui Koyori）'s birthday live 2026, themed around game songs. The video highlights her introductory talk and the full animated music video for her original song, '管制塔より' (From the Control Tower).

scenes.description: Introductory talk where Hakui Koyori discusses her 3D birthday live, the new 3D model, and introduces the following performance. No vocal music.
Music video for Hakui Koyori's original song '管制塔より' (From the Control Tower).
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ぽつり灯り 管制塔
砂嵐の向こうへ
祈るように綴った
これからのこと
ラジオネーム 匿名希望
お便り 届いていますか
この世界がいつからか
まるで他人事のように
やけに静かなので
不安になったのです
思い出したのです
人知れず口を噤んだまま
終われないのです
それは嫌なのです
夢ってもっと
わがままだったでしょう
応えてよ、笑ってよ、気付いてよ
此処に居るのにな、意地悪だな
誰にも届かない光を
どうしたら、伝えられるのでしょう
どうしても、伝えたいよ
ラジオネーム 匿名希望
意気地無しなのでしょうか
それともこの世界には
ぼくはお邪魔でしょうか
だとしても綴るよ
みっともなく叫ぶよ
フラれたって好きだよ
いいでしょ
いいでしょ
楽しかったよね
悔しかったよね
もう独り言は、嫌だ
「待たせちゃったかな」
「別に待ってないよ」
夢と呼んだ それもぼくだっただけ
もういいかい
応えてよ、笑ってよ、気付いてよ
此処に居るのにな、意地悪だな
誰にも届かない光を
ぼくだけは、光と呼び続ける
真夜中 管制塔から
世界(あなた)を明かしてやる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Dotted light, control tower
Toward the other side of the sandstorm
I wrote it down as if praying
About what comes next
Radio name, Anonymous hope
Are my letters reaching you?
Since when did this world
Become so strangely quiet,
As if it were someone else's problem?
I became anxious
And remembered
While keeping my mouth shut, unknown to others
I cannot end it
I hate that
Dreams should have been more
Selfish, right?
Answer me, smile, notice me
I am here, aren't you mean?
That light that reaches no one
What should I do to convey it?
No matter what, I want to convey it
Radio name, Anonymous hope
Am I just a coward?
Or am I in the way
Of this world?
Even so, I will write it
I will shout, looking unsightly
Even if I am dumped, I love you
It's fine, right?
It's fine, right?
It was fun, wasn't it?
It was frustrating, wasn't it?
I don't want to talk to myself anymore
"Did I keep you waiting?"
"I'm not particularly waiting"
What I called a dream was just me
Are you ready?
Answer me, smile, notice me
I am here, aren't you mean?
That light that reaches no one
I alone will keep calling it light
In the middle of the night, from the control tower
I will reveal the world (you)
